forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Keith, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of frost in the north in the early morning. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog in the north. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Patchy fog and the chance of frost in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny. The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Patchy fog and frost in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the west coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending easterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Patchy fog and frost south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the early morning then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. The chance of morning frost about the Gammon Ranges. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog and frost south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
